---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Swoop
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## 🎯 Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? What's the current pain point?

## 💡 Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you'd like to see implemented.

## 🔄 User Story
**As a** [type of user]  
**I want** [goal/desire]  
**So that** [benefit/value]

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## 🖼️ Mockups/Examples
If applicable, add mockups, wireframes, or examples of similar features.

## 🏗️ Technical Considerations
- **Frontend Impact:** [React components, pages affected]
- **Backend Impact:** [API endpoints, database changes]
- **Performance Impact:** [Expected impact on performance]
- **Security Impact:** [Any security considerations]

## 📋 Implementation Complexity
- [ ] Simple (few hours)
- [ ] Medium (1-2 days)
- [ ] Complex (1+ weeks)
- [ ] Major (requires planning)

## 🎯 Priority
- [ ] Critical - Blocking major use cases
- [ ] High - Important for user experience
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have improvement
- [ ] Low - Future consideration

## 🔗 Related Features
List any existing features this would integrate with or depend on.

## 🧪 Demo Impact
How would this feature be showcased in demos?
- [ ] Would enhance Golden Path demo
- [ ] Would enhance Edge Path demo
- [ ] Would enhance Investor demo
- [ ] No demo impact

## 📊 Success Metrics
How would we measure the success of this feature?

## 🚫 Alternative Solutions
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.
